systems.name: opencode Session Runtime
systems.description: Main session loop that builds system prompt every round, dispatches LLM calls, and manages skill layer state

systems.name: Skill Library
systems.description: Bundled + user-installed skills under ~/.claude/skills/ (or templates/skills/ during dev)

systems.name: SkillLayerRegistry
systems.description: In-memory per-session skill state tracker; handles recordLoaded / pin / unpin / applyIdleDecay

systems.name: RuntimeEventService
systems.description: Append-only anomaly + workflow event log, consumed by dashboard

containers.name: Mandatory Skills Layer
containers.description: New module — parses sentinel blocks, preloads + pins skills

containers.name: Prompt Assembly
containers.description: Session loop that constructs system[] array per round

components.name: InstructionPrompt.systemPaths
components.description: Resolves AGENTS.md file paths (global + project + config-declared)

components.name: InstructionPrompt.system
components.description: Loads AGENTS.md contents; 10s TTL cache; returns instruction text[]

components.name: parseMandatorySkills
components.description: Pure function: scans text for <!-- opencode:mandatory-skills --> blocks, returns skill name array

components.name: resolveMandatoryList
components.description: Orchestrates parse across AGENTS.md (main) or coding.txt (coding subagent); dedup with project priority

components.name: preloadMandatorySkills
components.description: For each skill: load SKILL.md, recordLoaded + pin; handle missing-file fallback (warn + event)

components.name: reconcileMandatoryList
components.description: Diff current pinned skills vs new list; unpin removed entries

components.name: SessionPrompt runLoop
components.description: Session loop; builds system[] per round, including skill-layer content

components.name: SkillLayerRegistry.unpin
components.description: NEW — Mark entry pinned=false; allow future idle-decay; keep runtime state as active

components.name: SkillLayerRegistry.applyIdleDecay
components.description: Per-round tick; downgrade idle entries; skip pinned

components.name: skill-layer-seam
components.description: Composes skill content into system prompt text with <skill_layer> tags

components.name: RuntimeEventService.append
components.description: Records workflow / anomaly events for dashboard consumption

relationships.label: every round: get instruction text + paths
parse each text file for sentinel block
every round end: reconcile pinned vs list
compose system[] from skill layer + instruction
